description: Legacy ecosystem mascot collectible. Existing DNFT collection on BNB Chain — reframed as a Civilization Collectible, not generic NFT minting. Historical mint, wallet, and market surfaces remain at their original routes.
role: Human engagement and ecosystem identity — priority airdrop participation and DAO voting rights per legacy marketing copy.

contract.label: DNFT (Nft) — detected from contracts.ts
contract.notes: Contract reference only — minting logic untouched. BSC mainnet address from legacy config.

metadata.notes: Legacy UI uses Pinata gateway for PNG previews; JSON metadata fetched from on-chain tokenURI. No fake metadata URIs in this read model.

supply.notes: 1,000-piece cap stated on legacy /nft/ marketing copy. Minted count not indexed in this read model — no fake totals.

mint.notes: Real mint via legacy /nft/ page (BSC only). This registry does not execute mints.

warnings: Legacy mint surface — not a new launch mechanism
No ownership or mint counts indexed here
Mint cost and quota are on-chain dynamic values on /nft/
disclaimer: Civilization Collectibles read model only. No ownership counts, mint buttons, or on-chain writes on /collectibles. Legacy mint flows remain on their original routes.
